title: schizeilema ranunculus
intro: Schizeilema ranunculus, also known as the Lilyturf or Rainbow Grass, is a type of flowering plant native to New Zealand and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Schizeilema ranunculus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide antioxidant protection. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion, tincture, or dried powder for use in herbal remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
